example_tasks: Ask team for feedback on design
Determine scope of new project phase
Verify if data source is reliable
Ask for clarification on meeting agenda
Check status of pending support ticket
Look up definition of technical term
reasoning: While the icon clearly represents a question or uncertainty, it is too generic and primarily functions as a UI/navigation glyph for help or error states. In a long TODO list, it lacks the specificity needed to distinguish between different types of tasks, as almost any task could technically be a 'question'.
